competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Tajon Buchanan (Canada).
Attempt saved. Teboho Mokoena (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Maxime Crépeau (Canada). Assisted by Relebohile Mofokeng.

events.description: 莫科埃纳射正。 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Stephen Eustaquio (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box is too high.

events.description: 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Canada. Conceded by Thapelo Maseko.
Relebohile Mofokeng (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
VAR Decision: Other Decision Cancelled.
Corner, Canada. Conceded by Yaya Sithole.
Attempt missed. Jonathan David (Canada) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 乔纳森·戴维射门偏出。 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Relebohile Mofokeng (South Africa).

events.description: 雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ime Okon (South Africa).
Attempt saved. Derek Cornelius (Canada) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross.

events.description: 德里克·科尼利厄斯射正。 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Teboho Mokoena (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Thapelo Maseko.

events.description: 莫科埃纳射门被封堵。 塔佩洛·马塞科参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Mbekezeli Mbokazi (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Tani Oluwaseyi (Canada) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the top left corner by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Liam Millar.

events.description: 塔尼·奥卢瓦塞伊射正。 利亚姆·米勒参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, South Africa. Conceded by Liam Millar.
Attempt missed. Ime Okon (South Africa) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Oswin Appollis with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 伊梅·奥康射门偏出。 奥斯温·阿波利斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Other Decision Cancelled.
Foul by Thapelo Maseko (South Africa).
Foul by Yaya Sithole (South Africa).
Foul by Mbekezeli Mbokazi (South Africa).

events.description: 姆贝凯泽利·姆博卡齐犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Tani Oluwaseyi (Canada) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 塔尼·奥卢瓦塞伊射门偏出。 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Canada. Conceded by Khuliso Mudau.
Attempt blocked. Moïse Bombito (Canada) header from very close range is blocked. Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross.

events.description: 莫伊兹邦比托射门被封堵。 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Tajon Buchanan (Canada) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the bottom right corner by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Derek Cornelius.

events.description: 塔琼·布坎南射正。 德里克·科尼利厄斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Relebohile Mofokeng (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins South Africa 0, Canada 0.
Substitution, South Africa. Thalente Mbatha replaces Relebohile Mofokeng.

events.description: 塔伦特·姆巴塔替补登场，换下雷勒博希勒·莫佛肯。

qualifiers.espnText: Khuliso Mudau (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Mbekezeli Mbokazi (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Khuliso Mudau (South Africa) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Thalente Mbatha (South Africa).
Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Khuliso Mudau (South Africa) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Nathan Saliba (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Thapelo Maseko (South Africa).
Delay in match because of an injury Stephen Eustaquio (Canada).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Canada. Niko Sigur replaces Nathan Saliba.

events.description: 尼科·西古尔替补登场，换下内森·萨利巴。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Canada. Luc De Fougerolles replaces Moïse Bombito.

events.description: 卢克·德富热罗勒替补登场，换下莫伊兹邦比托。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (South Africa).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Oswin Appollis (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right.

events.description: 奥斯温·阿波利斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Tani Oluwaseyi (Canada) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Niko Sigur with a through ball.

events.description: 塔尼·奥卢瓦塞伊射正。 尼科·西古尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Canada. Conceded by Mbekezeli Mbokazi.
Attempt missed. Luc De Fougerolles (Canada) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Stephen Eustaquio with a cross following a corner.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Luc de Fougerolles Shot Off Targ

events.description: 卢克·德富热罗勒射门偏出。 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Teboho Mokoena (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Niko Sigur (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Canada. Promise David replaces Tani Oluwaseyi.

events.description: 大卫答应替补登场，换下塔尼·奥卢瓦塞伊。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Liam Millar.

events.description: 雅各布·沙菲尔博格替补登场，换下利亚姆·米勒。

qualifiers.espnText: Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Aubrey Modiba (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Thalente Mbatha (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Thapelo Maseko.

events.description: 塔伦特·姆巴塔射门偏出。 塔佩洛·马塞科参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Canada. Alphonso Davies replaces Tajon Buchanan.

events.description: 阿方索·戴维斯替补登场，换下塔琼·布坎南。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Thalente Mbatha (South Africa).
Attempt missed. Promise David (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Jonathan David following a fast break.

events.description: 大卫答应射门偏出。 乔纳森·戴维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Jonathan David (Canada) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is saved in the top left corner by Ronwen Williams (South Africa). Assisted by Alphonso Davies.

events.description: 乔纳森·戴维射正。 阿方索·戴维斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Aubrey Modiba (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 雅各布·沙菲尔博格犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Oswin Appollis (South Africa) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Yaya Sithole.

events.description: 奥斯温·阿波利斯射门偏出。 斯佩菲罗-西特莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Oswin Appollis (South Africa) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Substitution, South Africa. Iqraam Rayners replaces Evidence Makgopa.

events.description: 伊克拉姆·雷纳斯替补登场，换下证据·马克戈帕。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, South Africa. Tshepang Moremi replaces Thapelo Maseko.

events.description: 哲邦·莫雷米替补登场，换下塔佩洛·马塞科。

qualifiers.espnText: Khuliso Mudau (South Africa) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Iqraam Rayners (South Africa).
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! South Africa 0, Canada 1. Stephen Eustaquio (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.

events.description: 斯蒂芬·尤斯塔奎奥破门，加拿大 1-0 领先。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, South Africa. Mbekezeli Mbokazi is caught offside.
Foul by Mbekezeli Mbokazi (South Africa).

events.description: 姆贝凯泽利·姆博卡齐犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half ends, South Africa 0, Canada 1.

events.description: 全场结束，南非 0-1 加拿大。
